glosses.vi: sự thanh lịch; sự tao nhã

translations.en: I really like her natural elegance.
translations.es: Me gusta mucho su elegancia natural.
translations.de: Ich mag ihre natürliche Eleganz sehr.
translations.it: Mi piace molto la sua eleganza naturale.
translations.ko: 나는 그녀의 자연스러운 우아함이 정말 마음에 든다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我很喜欢她的自然优雅。
translations.yue: 我好鍾意佢自然嘅優雅。
translations.ru: Мне очень нравится её естественная элегантность.
translations.pt: Gosto muito da elegância natural dela.
translations.he: אני מאוד אוהב את האלגנטיות הטבעית שלה.
translations.vi: Tôi rất thích vẻ thanh lịch tự nhiên của cô ấy.
translations.nl: Ik houd erg van haar natuurlijke elegantie.
translations.uk: Мені дуже подобається її природна елегантність.
translations.hi: मुझे उसकी स्वाभाविक शालीनता बहुत पसंद है.
translations.pl: Bardzo podoba mi się jej naturalna elegancja.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει πολύ η φυσική της κομψότητα.
translations.nb: Jeg liker hennes naturlige eleganse veldig godt.
translations.sv: Jag tycker mycket om hennes naturliga elegans.
translations.ro: Îmi place foarte mult eleganța ei naturală.
translations.cs: Mám moc rád její přirozenou eleganci.
translations.da: Jeg kan rigtig godt lide hendes naturlige elegance.
translations.fi: Pidän todella paljon hänen luonnollisesta eleganssistaan.
translations.ja: 彼女の自然な優雅さがとても好きです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun elided before a vowel-initial verb; 1st person singular.
Main verb in present indicative; 1st person singular agreeing with J'.
Degree adverb intensifying aimer (J'aime bien = ‘I quite like’).
Possessive determiner for a vowel-initial feminine noun; modifies élégance.
Feminine noun; direct object of aime, head of the NP élégance naturelle.
Attributive adjective, feminine singular, agreeing with élégance.

sentences.target: Tu remarques l'élégance de cette robe.

translations.fr: Tu remarques l'élégance de cette robe.
translations.en: You notice the elegance of that dress.
translations.es: Notas la elegancia de ese vestido.
translations.de: Du bemerkst die Eleganz dieses Kleides.
translations.zh-Hans: 你注意到那件连衣裙的优雅。
translations.yue: 你留意到嗰條裙嘅優雅。
translations.pt: Você percebe a elegância desse vestido.
translations.he: אתה שם לב לאלגנטיות של השמלה הזאת.
translations.vi: Bạn nhận ra vẻ thanh lịch của chiếc váy đó.
translations.nl: Je merkt de elegantie van die jurk op.
translations.hu: Észreveszed annak a ruhának az eleganciáját.
translations.hi: तुम उस ड्रेस की शालीनता को नोटिस करते हो.
translations.el: Παρατηρείς την κομψότητα αυτού του φορέματος.
translations.nb: Du legger merke til elegansen i den kjolen.
translations.sv: Du lägger märke till elegansen i den där klänningen.
translations.da: Du lægger mærke til kjolens elegance.
translations.ja: あなたはあのドレスの上品さに気づく。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; 2nd person singular.
Main verb in present indicative; 2nd person singular agreeing with Tu.
Definite article cliticized before vowel-initial noun.
Feminine noun; direct object of remarques.
Preposition introducing a noun complement (de cette robe).
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, modifying robe.
Feminine noun; object of the preposition de.

sentences.target: Son élégance fait tourner les têtes.

translations.fr: Son élégance fait tourner les têtes.
translations.de: Ihre Eleganz zieht alle Blicke auf sich.
translations.it: La sua eleganza attira gli sguardi.
translations.zh-Hans: 她的优雅吸引众人目光。
translations.yue: 佢嘅優雅吸引住眾人嘅目光。
translations.pt: A elegância dela chama a atenção.
translations.vi: Vẻ thanh lịch của cô ấy thu hút mọi ánh nhìn.
translations.hu: Az ő eleganciája magára vonzza a tekinteteket.
translations.hi: उसकी शालीनता सबका ध्यान खींच लेती है.
translations.el: Η κομψότητά της τραβά τα βλέμματα.
translations.sv: Hennes elegans drar till sig blickar.
translations.ja: 彼女の優雅さは周囲の視線を集める.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying élégance; used before vowel-initial feminine noun.
Feminine noun; subject of fait.
Main verb in present indicative; 3rd person singular; introduces causative construction.
Infinitive verb complement in causative (faire + infinitif).
Definite article, plural, introducing têtes.
Plural feminine noun; direct object of tourner.

sentences.target: Nous cherchons l'élégance plutôt que l'extravagance.

translations.fr: Nous cherchons l'élégance plutôt que l'extravagance.
translations.en: We look for elegance rather than extravagance.
translations.es: Buscamos la elegancia en lugar de la extravagancia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们追求优雅而非奢华。
translations.yue: 我哋追求優雅多於追求浮誇。
translations.ru: Мы ищем элегантность, а не вычурность.
translations.pt: Buscamos elegância em vez de extravagância.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tìm kiếm sự thanh lịch hơn là sự phô trương.
translations.ar: نبحث عن الأناقة لا عن البذخ.
translations.nl: Wij zoeken elegantie in plaats van buitensporigheid.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо елегантність, а не надмірність.
translations.hu: Az eleganciát keressük, nem a hivalkodást.
translations.hi: हम दिखावे की बजाय शालीनता की तलाश करते हैं.
translations.el: Αναζητούμε την κομψότητα και όχι την υπερβολή.
translations.nb: Vi søker eleganse snarere enn ekstravaganse.
translations.id: Kami mencari keanggunan alih-alih kemewahan yang berlebihan.
translations.sv: Vi söker elegans snarare än extravagans.
translations.da: Vi søger elegance frem for ekstravagance.
translations.ja: 私たちは華美さよりも上品さを求める。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; 1st person plural.
Main verb in present indicative; 1st person plural agreeing with Nous.
Definite article cliticized before vowel-initial noun.
Feminine noun; direct object of cherchons.
Comparative adverb forming the correlative ‘plutôt que’ (‘rather than’).
Subordinating conjunction completing the comparative ‘plutôt que’.
Definite article cliticized before vowel-initial noun.
Feminine noun; complement in the ‘plutôt que’ contrast.
